summary: Comprehensive testing of ALL ENHANCEMENTS completed successfully. All new features (Settings, Leaderboard, Export, Enhanced MAX MODE) working perfectly with 100% backward compatibility maintained. Navigation expanded to 7 items as designed.

NEW: Session Notes API - save notes per phase functionality working
NEW: Leaderboard API - showing 2 opted-in users ranked by discipline score
NEW: Export APIs - both CSV sessions and JSON stats download working
NEW: Settings page - all 4 phase duration inputs, brightness slider (30-100%), sound toggle, leaderboard toggle working
NEW: Settings page - save functionality with success notification working
NEW: Leaderboard page - displays ranked users with proper data structure
NEW: Export page - both CSV and JSON download buttons functional
NEW: Enhanced MAX MODE - custom phase durations loaded from preferences (2min timer confirmed)
NEW: Enhanced MAX MODE - timer brightness setting applied (opacity style attribute)
NEW: Enhanced MAX MODE - session notes panel opens, saves notes successfully
NEW: Enhanced MAX MODE - exit functionality with confirmation modal working
NEW: Navigation updated - all 7 items present and functional (HOME, DASHBOARD, LEADERBOARD, AI COACH, EXPORT, SETTINGS, PROFILE)
Backward compatibility - Dashboard with discipline scores and streaks intact
Backward compatibility - Profile with badges system intact
Backward compatibility - AI Coach feedback generation still working
Backward compatibility - Core session management (START MAX MODE) intact
Authentication flow working with alex@studymax.com credentials
All original MVP features remain functional alongside new enhancements
